subcodes.first_line: Lo, the remembrance of thy Lord's mercy unto His servant Shafí', when He called unto him from beyond the sacred Mount, in the Spot of Command, from the Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر رحمه ربک عبده شفیعا و ناداه عن ورآء طور القدس فی بقعه الامر من الشجره
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @justice and wrath of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
